# Tareabox HyperFrames Catalog

> 100+ video composition blocks for HyperFrames (HTML-based video framework).
> Free, MIT-licensed. By Natalie Digital (Natalie Abadie).

## What this repo provides

Each block is a self-contained HTML file with embedded CSS, GSAP animations, and timeline data — installable into any HyperFrames project. Blocks come in vertical (1080×1920 for Reels/TikTok/Shorts) and horizontal (1920×1080 for YouTube) variants.

## Categories

- **text** — typewriter, warp, neon, glitch, chapter reveals, kinetic typography
- **layout** — YouTube creator scenes (PIP, split-screen, lower thirds), video hero/hook/caption templates, tutorial layouts
- **conversationapp** — animated chat UI mockups (iMessage, WhatsApp, Slack, Discord, Instagram DM, Twitter, iOS/Android notifications)
- **visual** — GIF stickers, callouts (tip/note/warning), indicators (zoom, timestamp, progress, keyboard shortcut)
- **data** — animated checklists, metric flip counters

## Install

Add to your project's `hyperframes.json`:
```json
{ "registry": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tareabox/tareabox-catalog-free/main/registry" }
```
Then:
```bash
npx hyperframes add <block-name>
```

Or `git clone` and copy blocks manually from `registry/blocks/{name}/`.

## Live preview

All 127 blocks rendered: https://tareabox.com/hf-catalog-free/
